From crawl spaces to attics, restaurants to rental properties, Sasquatch Pest Control brings a tough, effective approach to pest problems that won’t quit.

What We Help With

Whether you’re dealing with a one-time infestation or recurring seasonal pressure, our technicians are equipped for residential and commercial pest problems across the region.

Interior infestations

Ants, cockroaches, bed bugs, spiders, and rodents in kitchens, basements, attics, and living spaces.

Outdoor control

Mosquitoes, ticks, fleas, wasps, bees, and perimeter issues around homes, decks, and yards.

Specialty removal

Termite treatment, wildlife removal, and prevention plans tailored to your property.

Clear communication

We explain the problem, the solution, and the steps needed to keep pests away.

Local scheduling

Fast appointment windows for homeowners, landlords, and businesses.

Built for Upstate NY

Seasonal pressure and property types here demand practical, durable treatment plans.

Need help fast? Let’s get the inspection on the calendar.

Complete the form above and Sasquatch Pest Control will follow up quickly with the next available step for your property.
